results.rendered_html:
anūkta (von vac mit anu)
1〉 adj.
a〉 nachgesprochen, recitirt, im Text (instr.) stehend: tasmādyathaivarcānūktamevānubrūyāt ( SĀY. : yadaiva vede paṭhitam)  ŚAT. BR. 1,4,1,35 . yadvai kiṃ cānūktaṃ tasya sarvasya brahmetyekatā 14,4,3,26 . [Page1-0228] =  BṚH. ĀR. UP. 1,5,17 .
— b〉 studirt (bei einem Lehrer): ananūkta (vade)  ŚAT. BR. 14,4,2,28 . =  BṚH. ĀR. UP. 1,4,15 .
— 2〉 n.
a〉 Nacherwähnung, wiederholte Erwähnung  VOP. 3,144 . Vgl. anūkti und anvādeśa.
— b〉 Veda-Studium  ŚAT. BR. 3,2,4,16 . 5,3,11 . 4,5,6,5 . 6,1,14 . 14,2,2,46 . Vgl. anuvacana.

anūkta p. p. Repeated, recited after; occurring in the text studied.
— ktaṃ, -ktiḥ f.
1 Subsequent mention; repetition by way of explanation or illustration.
2 Study of the Vedas.
